calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-08-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-25-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Tomar Mason, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields, CSR #7235

David Williams, Esq. appeared for the Plaintiff(s) Mateel Environmental Justice Foundation.
Plaintiff's Witness Christopher Crow was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) River Goods, Inc. for Judgment with costs and attorney's fees of $27,072.00 (see scanned doc. for details of the Judgment)
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
